hero.title: We don't disappear after enrolment.
hero.description: Active learners get tutor office hours, exam re-sit policy, accessibility support, certificate replacement and a graduation alumni network — all included.

intro: Every EIOSH learner gets the same baseline support package — regardless of whether you enrolled directly, through a corporate cohort, or via a delivery partner. Need something not listed? Email support@eiosh.com.

services.title: Tutor office hours
services.description: Weekly small-group sessions with the lead tutor on each programme. Drop-in, no booking needed.

services.title: Accessibility & adjustments
services.description: Reasonable adjustments for assessments — extra time, screen readers, alternative formats. Apply via student.services@eiosh.com.

services.title: Exam re-sits
services.description: One free re-sit included on regulated qualifications (T&Cs apply). Subsequent attempts at the awarding-body fee.

services.title: Certificate replacements
services.description: Lost a certificate? Order a replacement (digital or printed) at the certificate-replacement page in the student dashboard.

services.title: Alumni network
services.description: Once you've certified, you're invited to the alumni community at /community — free, peer-led, full of senior HSE professionals.

services.title: Direct support
services.description: Email support@eiosh.com. We aim to respond within one business day. Urgent? Use the WhatsApp link in the footer.

cta.heading: Already enrolled?
cta.description: Sign in to your student dashboard for course materials, certificates and exam schedules.
